description: You are a Data Engineer. Using the SQLite database at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_analytics.db, extend it with analytics objects. Use the connection name 'ChinookAnalytics'. Create a VIEW named 'vw_monthly_revenue' aggregating 'invoices' data with columns Year, Month, TotalRevenue, InvoiceCount, and UniqueCustomers, grouped and ordered chronologically. Create a TABLE named 'customer_lifetime_value' with columns CustomerId (PK), FirstName, LastName, Email, Country, TotalSpent, InvoiceCount, FirstPurchaseDate, LastPurchaseDate, AvgInvoiceValue, and CustomerSegment. Populate this table using 'customers' and 'invoices' data, assigning CustomerSegment as 'High' (TotalSpent >= 40.00), 'Medium' (20.00 <= TotalSpent < 40.00), or 'Low' (TotalSpent < 20.00). Create INDEXES 'idx_clv_segment' on CustomerSegment and 'idx_clv_country' on Country. Save all SQL statements to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/analytics_schema.sql. Use appropriate SQLite syntax for date functions.
